name: Fasting-mimicking diet
summary: Short-cycle dietary program tracked for autophagy-pathway, caloric-restriction-mimetic, and insulin/IGF biomarker movement in small human studies.
mechanism_summary: Uses periodic low-calorie, low-protein dietary cycles intended to engage fasting-like nutrient-sensing, IGF-1 lowering, and autophagy programs.

open_questions: Whether short-term autophagy-marker and IGF-1 movement persists or translates into functional aging benefit
Which formulation, protein level, and cycle schedule best maps to aging biology
Whether weight loss, calorie restriction, protein restriction, or fasting-like signaling drives the observed biomarker changes
